title: Year Guesser: World History
description: Guess the year of major world events

questions.question: When did the French Revolution begin?
questions.explanation: The French Revolution began with the storming of the Bastille on July 14, 1789.

questions.question: When did the Titanic sink?
questions.explanation: The RMS Titanic sank on April 15, 1912 after hitting an iceberg.

questions.question: When did World War I begin?
questions.explanation: WWI began on July 28, 1914 after the assassination of Archduke Franz Ferdinand.

questions.question: When was the Declaration of Independence signed?
questions.explanation: The US Declaration of Independence was signed on July 4, 1776.

questions.question: When did the atomic bomb drop on Hiroshima?
questions.explanation: The US dropped an atomic bomb on Hiroshima on August 6, 1945.

questions.question: When did the Roman Empire fall (Western)?
questions.explanation: The Western Roman Empire fell in 476 AD when Romulus Augustulus was deposed.

questions.question: When did Christopher Columbus reach the Americas?
questions.explanation: Columbus landed in the Bahamas on October 12, 1492.

questions.question: When was the Magna Carta signed?
questions.explanation: The Magna Carta was sealed by King John of England in 1215.

questions.question: When did the Black Death reach Europe?
questions.explanation: The Black Death arrived in Europe in 1347, killing roughly a third of the population.

questions.question: When did Napoleon become Emperor of France?
questions.explanation: Napoleon crowned himself Emperor on December 2, 1804.

questions.question: When was the Great Wall of China construction started?
questions.explanation: The earliest walls were built around 700 BC, but major construction began under Emperor Qin Shi Huang in 221 BC.

questions.question: When did the Russian Revolution occur?
questions.explanation: The Russian Revolution took place in 1917, overthrowing the Tsar.

questions.question: When was the United Nations founded?
questions.explanation: The UN was established on October 24, 1945.

questions.question: When did the Cuban Missile Crisis happen?
questions.explanation: The Cuban Missile Crisis was a 13-day confrontation in October 1962.

questions.question: When did the Berlin Wall go up?
questions.explanation: The Berlin Wall was erected on August 13, 1961 by East Germany.
